title: Model Compression Path
description: Build fluency in Model Compression inside Model Optimization by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Quantization
steps.summary: Representing neural network weights and activations using fewer bits, often for deployment on resource-constrained devices. It sits inside Model Optimization / Model Compression. Compare it with Model Quantization and weight quantization. It opens into NF4 quantization and fp16 quantization.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: token pruning
steps.summary: token pruning belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Model Optimization / Model Compression. Start after Model Pruning and Pruning. It opens into Adaptive Token Pruning and Variational Token Pruning.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Weight Pruning
steps.summary: Weight Pruning belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Model Optimization / Model Compression. Start after Model Pruning and Pruning. It opens into Weight Pruning Extensions and Weight Pruning Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: self-distillation
steps.summary: self-distillation belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Model Optimization / Model Compression. Start after Distillation and Model Distillation. It opens into Self-Distillation (KD-T) and Self-Distillation (KD-L2).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Memory Compression
steps.summary: Memory Compression belongs to the Model Optimization area of AI/ML, within Model Compression. It sits inside Model Optimization / Model Compression.
